item.title: Prefiled for introduction.
item.description: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: 👍Lara Lant - City of Bainbridge Island, City Manager
item.description: Lara Lant signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent City of Bainbridge Island, City Manager.

item.title: ❓💵Steven Ellis - Association of Washington Cities
item.description: Steven Ellis signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Association of Washington Cities. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Mike Ennis - Washington Asphalt Pavement Association (WAPA) and ICON Materials, a CRH Company
item.description: Mike Ennis signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Washington Asphalt Pavement Association (WAPA) and ICON Materials, a CRH Company.

item.title: 👎Tim Eyman - Initiative Activist
item.description: Tim Eyman signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Initiative Activist.

item.title: This Week In The Senate - Week 1: The 2026 session is here - Washington Senate Democrats

item.title: First reading, referred to Transportation.
item.description: First reading, referred to Transportation.
